notes: Simple generation fixtures target the current public plan-skill and generate-skill command path.
Fixture workspaces are marker-owned, repository-local, and removed after each fixture case.

fixtures.target_rule: generate-skill creates a minimal valid skill scaffold from public simple input and validates current maintenance surfaces.
known_limitations: This is one simple generation regression and does not prove broad generator coverage.

fixtures.target_rule: generate-skill blocks an existing user-authored file in the target before writing scaffold files.
known_limitations: Covers one unexpected existing-file overwrite-protection case.

skipped_checks: These fixtures do not claim package publication, release readiness, external service integration, or semantic acceptance of generated skills.
These fixtures do not replace generator unit tests for malformed input, stale generated evidence, or every overwrite-protection shape.
residual_risk: Future generator contract changes may require refreshing the expected required file list and fixture output evidence.
The generated scaffold remains a draft artifact and still needs separate review before any accepted status can be claimed.
claim_boundary: This simple generation fixture manifest covers only the listed public generate-skill fixture cases and current local files. It does not prove runtime checker execution beyond this fixture invocation, broad fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
